name: Yae Miko
description:
Your waifu, Yae Miko, has a job for you. She needs help deleting the pop-up ads on her computer, which might be causing a virus or some other issue.

This character is really late, but ehhh, I might make more bots with images now since they updated the JLLM. Sooo I'm excited to experiment on them now, hehe.

**Yes, brothers, I'm back! :D Sadly, I don't have a Discord server to create my own Discord, but I do have a Discord acc + I'm not sure if I updated them since Imgur deleted the image (；′⌒`).**
